words.def: someone engaged in or experienced in warfare
words.zh: n. 戰士, 勇士, 武士, 鼓吹戰爭的人, 戰鬥, 尚武

words.def: a mark to indicate a direction or relation
words.zh: n. 箭, 箭狀物, 箭頭記號
n. 吼, 咆哮, 轟鳴

words.def: the waging of armed conflict against an enemy
words.zh: n. 戰爭, 戰爭狀態, 戰術, 軍事, 衝突, 鬥爭, 競爭

words.def: a mixture of gases (especially oxygen) required for breathing; the stuff that the wind consists of
words.zh: n. 空氣, 旋律, 態度
n. 擦傷處, 半成品

words.def: an arrangement of objects or people side by side in a line
words.zh: n. 排, 行, 街道, 划船, 吵鬧
